About the Space

Timeless Charm
Amidst Nature

Immerse yourself in timeless charm at our vintage bungalow nestled amidst nature's embrace. Discover tranquility on the expansive green lawn adorned with vibrant flowers and majestic trees.

The strategically located house boasts a captivating entrance, offering a haven for nature lovers seeking a comfortably serene retreat. Experience the best of Jorhat in this picturesque sanctuary. We have High Speed WiFi connectivity and a TV with extra music system for your effortless comfort!

🌺 Beautiful Lawn ☕ Outdoor Coffee Spot 🎸 Music System 📺 Smart TV 🐾 Pet Friendly 🌙 Outdoor Swing

Amenities

Everything You Need

📶

High-Speed WiFi

Stay connected throughout your stay with our fast and reliable internet connection.

📺

Smart TV + Music

Enjoy entertainment with a large smart TV and an extra music system for ambience.

❄️

Air Conditioning

Stay cool and comfortable with AC in the rooms for a restful night's sleep.

🌿

Garden & Lawn

A beautifully maintained expansive green lawn with vibrant flowers and majestic trees.

🛋️

Spacious Interiors

Big, airy rooms with high ceilings for your utmost comfort and relaxation.

☕

Outdoor Coffee Spot

A cozy outdoor area with a swing — perfect for morning coffee in the garden.

🔑

Self Check-In

Check yourself in with the lockbox at your convenience — no waiting required.

🐾

Pet Friendly

We welcome you and your beloved pets to be part of the Palm 715 family.

House Rules

A Few Kind Reminders

01

Close the Gate

Please make sure to close the gate once you enter the premises.

02

Quiet Hours

Avoid making loud noise after 10 PM out of respect for the neighbourhood.

03

Save Energy

Please turn off AC and all electrical equipment before leaving the premises.

FIND US

Palm 715 A Private Vintage & Luxury Stay

Experience Resort Living in the Heart of Nature

Welcome to Palm 715, a peaceful, premium homestay located right beside National Highway 715 (NH37), Pulibor, Jorhat 785006 opposite Nova Nissan Dealer. Designed for comfort, privacy, and elegance, Palm 715 offers a complete resort-style living experience with lush greenery, open spaces, and beautifully curated interiors.

📍 NH 715, Pulibor, Jorhat
🏨 Opposite Nova Nissan Dealer
📮 PIN: 785006
ALSO BY THE SAME HOST 🏡 Aarna Homestay · Dibrugarh, Assam

PRIME LOCATION

Easy to Find, Easy to Love

Located right beside NH 715 (formerly NH37) in Pulibor, Jorhat. Easy highway access with smooth connectivity to the city, airport, and nearby attractions — surrounded by peaceful natural beauty.

🛣️ Right beside NH 715 (NH37), Pulibor
